<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Bootstrappers; use Pest\Contracts\Bootstrapper; use Pest\Support\View; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\OutputInterface; /** * @internal */ final readonly class BootView implements Bootstrapper { /** * Creates a new instance of the Boot View. */ public function __construct( private OutputInterface $output ) { // .. } /** * Boots the view renderer. */ public function boot(): void { View::renderUsing($this->output); } }
